prompt: Create a bright, highly detailed anime-style summer scene in a mountain parking lot beside a cable-stayed bridge, under a vivid blue sky with scattered fluffy white clouds. The central subject is Alma, a cheerful young fox-girl with sandy-blonde hair, upright northern fox ears, and a playful carefree pose, wearing an oversized red and black plaid hoodie, black shorts, and chunky black lace-up boots; she is stepping lightly as if dancing while holding a soap-bubble wand and looking delighted. Around her are exactly 3 other school-age girls playing with bubbles: one on the left with long black hair in a navy jacket, skirt, black socks, and sneakers, raising a bubble wand; one near the center-left with short silvery hair, a gray hoodie, dark skirt, tights, and white sneakers, holding a small bubble bottle; and one on the right in a beige hoodie and dark skirt, reaching up toward the bubbles. Show exactly 4 large prominent soap bubbles: one huge iridescent bubble floating beside the fox-girl at lower right, one large bubble high above her, one large bubble near the upper right, and one medium-large bubble near the left sky; also include about 14 smaller bubbles scattered between them, all transparent with rainbow highlights and glossy reflections of the landscape. The background includes green forested mountains with a little snow on distant peaks, a tall cable-stayed bridge tower and cables on the left, parked cars and vans on the right, white parking-lot lines on asphalt, roadside greenery, and a blue road sign reading ニセコ大橋 with small English text below. Use a cinematic wide-angle composition, low slightly upward viewpoint, crisp sunlight, soft shadows, airy depth, sparkling bubble reflections, and polished modern anime illustration quality with painterly realism and clean detailed linework.
